english: To Rama, to Ramabhadra, to Ramachandra the creator
To Raghunatha the lord, husband of Sita — salutations

hindi: शिवं राममयं वन्दे, रामं शिवमयं भजे।
english: I salute Shiva who is full of Rama, I worship Rama who is full of Shiva
roman: Shivam Ramamayam vande Ramam Shivamayam bhaje

english: Liberation from the non-difference of Shiva-Rama, devoted to Shiva-Rama
roman: Shiva Rama abhedat muktih Shiva Rama parayana

english: Lord Rameshwara Mahadeva, the Shivalinga at the Setubandha
I salute that Rameshwara devoted to both Ram and Shiva
Whoever reads this Shiva Ramastakam with devotion
roman: Shiva Rama ashtakam idam yah pathed bhakti samanvitah

hindi: शिवलोकं च रामस्य धाम प्राप्नोति निश्चितम्॥
english: Certainly attains the world of Shiva and the abode of Rama
roman: Shivalokam cha Ramasya dhama prapnoti nishchitam
